name: Cellnet Group Limited
summary: Cellnet Group Limited engages in the distribution, warehousing, and logistics businesses primarily in Australia and New Zealand. The company sources and distributes brands of lifestyle technology products, including mobile phones, gaming, tablets, and notebooks/hybrid accessories through retail and business channels; and fulfillment services to the mobile telecommunications and retail industries. Cellnet Group Limited was founded in 1992 and is based in Brisbane, Australia. Cellnet Group Limited is a subsidiary of Wentronic Holding GmbH.
